name: Restaurant365 Restaurant ERP API
what_it_does: Restaurant365 Restaurant ERP REST API for multi-unit restaurant accounting, food cost management, and operations. Enables AI agents to manage restaurant accounting and AP invoice processing for food service financial automation, handle food cost and recipe costing for restaurant profitability management, access labor scheduling and tip management for restaurant workforce operations, retrieve inventory management and food waste tracking for restaurant supply chain optimization, manage vendor invoice and price change management for restaurant purchasing automation, handle catering and event management for food service revenue operations, access financial consolidation and reporting for restaurant group management, retrieve sales data integration from POS systems (Toast, NCR, Aloha) for restaurant analytics, manage payroll integration and tip reporting for restaurant HR compliance, and integrate Restaurant365 with food distributors, POS vendors, and accounting platforms.
use_cases: Automating AP invoice processing from restaurant operations agents
Managing food cost from recipe and inventory agents
Tracking labor costs from workforce management agents
Consolidating multi-unit financials from restaurant group agents
not_for: Single-location independent restaurants without multi-unit scale
Food manufacturers without restaurant/food service operations
Retail grocery without restaurant operations focus
best_when: A restaurant group, DSO (Dining Service Operator), or multi-unit food service company using Restaurant365 wants AI agents to automate restaurant accounting, food cost management, labor scheduling, and multi-unit financial consolidation.
avoid_when: TIP REPORTING RISK: Restaurant365 manages tip pooling and tip distribution — automated tip calculation and allocation must comply with FLSA tip pooling rules (post-2018 FLSA amendment) and state tip credit laws; automated tip errors create wage and hour class action exposure. Food safety traceability — automated food cost and inventory tracking must support FSMA food safety traceability requirements (FDA Rule 204); automated inventory records may be needed for food recall traceability. Sales tax compliance — automated restaurant sales tax calculation for food and beverage must apply correct state food tax exemptions; restaurant food vs. beverage tax treatment varies significantly by state.

auth.notes: Restaurant365 uses OAuth 2.0. Developer portal at developer.restaurant365.com. Webhooks for restaurant operations events. REST API with JSON. Irvine, California HQ. Founded 2011. Private (KKR-backed, 2019). 40,000+ restaurant locations. Restaurant ERP market leader. Deep POS integration (Toast, Aloha, NCR). Competes with CrunchTime, Compeat, and CTUIT for restaurant operations management.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — per-location monthly subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-location monthly subscription; enterprise restaurant group pricing
pricing.notes: Irvine, CA. Founded 2011. KKR-backed. 40,000+ locations. Restaurant ERP leader. Deep Toast/Aloha POS integration. Competes with CrunchTime and Compeat.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; documented in developer portal

known_agent_gotchas: FLSA TIP POOLING COMPLIANCE: Automated tip distribution must comply with 2018 FLSA tip pooling amendment; tip pools cannot include managers or supervisors; automated tip allocation errors create wage and hour class action exposure

State tip credit laws — restaurant tip credit (taking tip credit against minimum wage) varies by state; 7 states (CA, OR, WA, MN, AK, MT, NV) prohibit tip credit; automated labor cost calculation must apply correct state tip credit rules

FSMA food traceability Rule 204 — automated food inventory records may be required for FDA FSMA food safety traceability for Key Data Elements (KDEs); automated records must support food recall traceability requirements

Restaurant sales tax complexity — food and beverage tax treatment varies significantly by state (prepared food vs. grocery exemptions); automated sales tax calculation must apply state-specific food exemption rules
POS sync timing — Restaurant365 receives sales data from POS systems (Toast, Aloha, NCR) via integration; POS sync delays affect inventory depletion calculations and food cost accuracy

Recipe costing ingredient pricing — automated recipe costing requires current ingredient pricing from vendor invoices; stale pricing creates inaccurate theoretical food cost and menu profitability reporting
agent_readiness.security_notes: Restaurant ERP. SOC2. OAuth2. US. Restaurant financial and labor data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Restaurant ERP. SOC2. OAuth2. US. Restaurant financial and employee data.
